response.justification: Bogdan brings over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, and cloud infrastructure, directly aligning with the role’s stack and responsibilities; his hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, internal tooling, and scalable systems, plus strong testing and architecture practices, make him a compelling fit despite limited explicit Nest.js or Vitest exposure.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in AI-agent systems and internal tooling development
Strong DevOps and testing culture (Docker, CI/CD, TDD, Vitest-equivalent practices)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited evidence of direct collaboration with product/design teams
German language proficiency is basic, may hinder local team integration
